use_cases: Displaying team members in a project management or collaboration tool
Showing user lists in admin dashboards or settings pages
Listing contributors or team members in developer tools
Presenting member rosters with role and priority indicators
ai_summary: A member list component that displays users with avatars, names, roles, and priority indicators in a clean, accessible table or list format. Uses Radix UI primitives for avatars and tooltips, with Tailwind CSS for styling. Features date formatting and Lucide icons for visual accents. Designed for team-based applications where member information needs to be displayed with quick-reference metadata.
